codeReview.summary: Re-reviewed the unified search implementation after the scrutiny fix. The prior blocking issue is resolved: explicitly requested gated sources now produce an exit-code-3 machine-readable error when all requested sources are blocked, and mixed valid+gated requests preserve the gated source in the success envelope with zero counts and per-source machine-readable errors. I did not find any remaining high-confidence actionable bugs in this feature.

summary: Pass: the gated-source regression is fixed. `internal/cli/search.go` now reports blocked search sources explicitly (`blocked_sources`, `gated_source`/`unsupported_source`, exit code 3 when no selectable sources remain), and `internal/cli/search_test.go` covers both gated-only and mixed valid+gated flows. No additional high-confidence review findings remain.
